description: for await (x of iterable) over a sync iterable / array of promises (Phase 1): parses (previously a syntax error), desugars to a sync for-of that awaits each element, reusing existing await + for-of. Covers break/continue, destructuring, Set, mixed promise/non-promise, and rejection-to-catch. True async iterables (Symbol.asyncIterator / async generators) deferred to the coroutine-core pass.
